title: panicum brevifolium var. hirtifolium
intro: Panicum brevifolium var. hirtifolium, also known as hairy panic grass, is a plant species belonging to the family Poaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues and inflammation. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and acting as an antiseptic. Hairy panic grass can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
